step_rationale: Actin cytoskeleton in endothelial/SMC contraction; calcification and plaque vulnerability via multiple mechanisms.
mechanism: Phosphatase regulating actin dynamics in endothelial dysfunction, arterial calcification, and fibrous-cap degradation driving plaque vulnerability and rupture.
